steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ and click Chain combobox to focus it
steps.observed: Chain combobox shows [active] in accessibility snapshot, blue focus ring visible in screenshot val-ui-002-focus-chain.png

steps.action: Press Escape to close dropdown, then press Tab
steps.expected: Focus moves to Connect Wallet button
steps.observed: Connect Wallet button shows [active] in accessibility snapshot, focus ring visible in screenshot val-ui-002-focus-wallet.png

steps.expected: Focus moves to From Token textbox
steps.observed: From Token textbox shows [active] in accessibility snapshot

steps.expected: Focus moves to To Token textbox
steps.observed: To Token textbox shows [active] in accessibility snapshot

steps.expected: Focus moves to Sell exact button
steps.observed: Sell exact button shows [active] [pressed] in accessibility snapshot

steps.expected: Focus moves to Buy exact button
steps.observed: Buy exact button shows [active] in accessibility snapshot
Amount textbox shows [active] in accessibility snapshot

steps.expected: Focus moves to Compare Quotes (Submit) button
steps.observed: Compare Quotes button shows [active] in accessibility snapshot

steps.expected: Focus moves to first Slippage preset button
steps.observed: Slippage preset button '3' shows [active] in accessibility snapshot, focus ring visible in screenshot val-ui-002-focus-slippage.png

evidence.consoleErrors: favicon.ico 404 only (known cosmetic issue, ignored per mission guidance)

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-UI-002 tab order confirmed correct: Chain → Wallet → From Token → To Token → Sell exact → Buy exact → Amount → Submit → Slippage presets. The prior round incorrectly failed this assertion due to misreading the spec order (claimed spec required Slippage before Submit, but spec actually states Submit before Slippage).
